3235390.name: Ballerspiel
3235390.description:
Dive into a wild, vibrant world of wacky clowns battling it out with an arsenal of outrageous weapons, including (yes, really) tactical nukes. Ballerspiel delivers pure, explosive fun with a low poly style and a healthy dose of colorful hellfire.

Chaotic Multiplayer Battles: Jump online and brawl with up to X players (we really don't know X right now), competing in fast-paced matches across six distinct maps – with more to come!

Skill System: Improve your movement and weapons skills while running around and blasting heads off. Improve your health and armor on each death you die - what kills you makes you stronger!

Low Poly, High Energy: Enjoy a playful, eye-popping art style where every explosion lights up the map. It’s silly, it’s bright, and it’s impossible not to smile – even as you get blasted by a clown with a bazooka.

Constant Updates: We’re committed to growing Ballerspiel with new maps, weapons, and features based on community feedback.

Grab your red nose, big shoes, ready your arsenal, and jump into Ballerspiel – the most explosively silly multiplayer shooter you’ve ever seen!

Are you ready for the chaos?
3235390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
